case_title: CASTANEDA, LAURA et al vs. CORDOVA, KEVIN EDWARD et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 04, MOTION TO DESIGNATE CASE AS AN UNINSURED MOTORIST, CALENDAR OF MAR-27-1997, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTANEDA, LAURA CASTANEDA, FELIPE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTANEDA, LAURA CASTANEDA, FELIPE AS TO DEFENDANT CORDOVA, KEVIN EDWARD DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-20-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-23-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-31-1996

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-20-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-20-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. FAILURE TO APPEAR AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-15-1997 CONTINUED FROM DEC-20-1996 TO JAN-21-1997 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
